title: Jake totem of undying
description: tiny jake from adventure time as totem
body:
i created this pack for personal use but i decided to publish it.this totem model doesn't completely made by me , i get the model from InkGhoul and i changed a little bit (you can use any minecraft skin with this model just go to the textures file rename your skin to ''totem_of_undying.png'' and change the texture).if you want to support this pack any way go check the InkGhoul's projects ,here's a link for you .

https://x.com/_InkGhoul
